metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4661
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1, 2. Mass-spectrometry and western-blot analyses of FACS-enriched mossy fiber synaptosomes from mouse brain show IgSF8 is enriched.

Figure 4c. Subcellular fractionations of whole rat brains which enrichment of IgSF8 in presynaptic subfraction, similar to synaptophysin, as opposed to PSD fraction (like PSD95).

Figure 4e, S4. Confocal microscopy suggests punctated staining at synapses.

While the microscopy evidence by itself lacks the resolution to localize IgSF8 to the presynapse, taking the subcellular fractionation data into account we agree with the author's conclusion of presynaptic localization. From discussion section; "Synapse type-specific proteome profiling and cell-surface protein interactome screening uncovered IgSF8 as an uncharacterized neuronal receptor for the ECM protein TenR at the mossy fiber synapse."

Based on the membrane topology of the protein, Figure 4a, "integral component of ... membrane" ontology term was selected.. Experimental description: "For the preparation of P2 crude synaptosome extracts, ten P21-22 rat brains were homogenized in homogenization buffer (4 mM Hepes pH 7.4, 0.32 M sucrose, and protease inhibitors) using a Dounce homogenizer"

antibody; goat anti-IgSF8 (1:500; R&D Systems)
